hooks.command: root=$(for git_bin in /usr/bin/git /opt/homebrew/bin/git /usr/local/bin/git; do [ -x "$git_bin" ] || continue; /usr/bin/env -i PATH=/usr/bin:/bin "$git_bin" -C "$(pwd -P)" rev-parse --show-toplevel && exit 0; done; exit 1) && /bin/sh "$root/hooks/run-local-bugbot-gate.sh" codex "$root"
